Metadata.title: AngeLove — Premium Children's Furniture
Metadata.description: European family label. Safe, comfortable and versatile children's furniture made with OEKO-TEX certified corduroy.

Hero.title: Premium Children's Furniture
Hero.subtitle: As parents, we know how important safe, comfortable and versatile products are for your children. Every AngeLove product is OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified and crafted from premium corduroy.

Products.title: Our Collection
Products.subtitle: Three premium products designed for play, rest and creativity

sofa.name: Children's Sofa
sofa.description: Modular play sofa with sleep function. 10 elements for countless configurations — from cosy sofa to spacious play mat. Premium corduroy with removable, washable covers.
sofa.features: Sleep function, 10 modular elements, Washable covers, OEKO-TEX certified

sessel.name: Children's Armchair
sessel.description: Multifunctional foam armchair that transforms from cosy seat to lounger to play mat. Lightweight enough for children to rearrange independently.

huepfpolster.name: Bouncing Cushion
huepfpolster.description: Indoor bouncing cushion with Bonnell spring system. Safe alternative to a trampoline — perfect for burning energy on rainy days. 78 × 60 × 24 cm.
huepfpolster.features: Bonnell springs, Indoor bouncing, 6 colours, OEKO-TEX certified

About.title: About AngeLove
About.subtitle: A European Family Label
About.story: AngeLove is a European family label born from our own parenting experience. As parents, we know how important safe, comfortable and versatile products are for children.
About.storyExtended: We created a collection of sofas, armchairs and modular foam elements that combine play, rest and creativity. Every product is made with OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified materials — the highest safety standard for textiles in contact with baby skin.
About.materialText: Every AngeLove product is upholstered in premium corduroy fabric — soft, durable, and stylish. Our carefully selected pastel colours blend harmoniously into modern living spaces, creating a warm and inviting atmosphere for your child.

safety.title: Safety First
safety.description: All products are OEKO-TEX Standard 100 certified — the highest textile safety standard. Hypoallergenic foam core and tested materials.

montessori.title: Montessori Inspired
montessori.description: Low-height furniture that encourages children's independence. Lightweight enough for children to rearrange themselves.

european.title: European Quality
european.description: Designed and manufactured in Europe. Premium corduroy upholstery and high-density foam for lasting comfort.

versatile.title: Versatile Design
versatile.description: Multi-functional furniture that adapts to every situation — from play to rest. Grows with your child.

Contact.title: Contact Us
Contact.subtitle: Have a question? We'd love to hear from you.
Contact.name: Your Name

Footer.tagline: Premium children's furniture. Made with love in Europe.
